name: YouTube Subtitle Agent
description: An agent that extracts subtitles from YouTube videos and retrieves video metadata (title, channel name, thumbnail URL). Supports both manually created and auto-generated subtitles in Japanese and English.

skills.name: subtitle_extraction
skills.description: Extracts available subtitles from YouTube videos, prioritizing manually created subtitles over auto-generated ones

parameters.preferred_langs: Array of preferred languages in order of preference (default: ['ja', 'en'])
parameters.include_auto_generated: Whether to include auto-generated subtitles if manual ones are not available (default: true)

skills.name: video_metadata
skills.description: Extracts metadata (channel name, thumbnail URL, video title) from YouTube videos

skills.name: content_type_detection
skills.description: Analyzes subtitle text to determine the type of content (recipe, tutorial, etc.)

usage_examples.title: Extract Subtitles
usage_examples.description: Extract subtitles from a YouTube cooking video

usage_examples.title: Extract Japanese Subtitles
usage_examples.description: Extract Japanese subtitles from a YouTube video
